questions.question: What is the main difference between a linked list and an array in terms of memory management?
questions.hint: Consider how memory is allocated and deallocated in each data structure

questions.question: Describe the time complexity of searching for an element in a balanced binary search tree. Compare it with a linear search in an array.
questions.hint: Consider the average and worst-case scenarios

questions.question: Explain how a heap data structure is used in sorting algorithms such as heap sort and how it compares to other sorting algorithms like quicksort and mergesort.
questions.hint: Consider the advantages and disadvantages of using a heap for sorting
